result.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: No, it cannot match. The quantitative gap is 0.155 (Riemann zeta zeros) vs 0.24 (GUE/Hermitian matrices).
JUSTIFICATION: The spectral rigidity of the Riemann zeta zeros is characterized by a much lower Delta_3 statistic (approximately 0.155) compared to the standard Gaussian Unitary Ensemble (GUE) which describes typical Hermitian matrices (approximately 0.24), indicating the zeta zeros are more rigidly distributed than standard Hermitian eigenvalues.
